listOfQuestions.question: In Web Development, what does "HTML" mean?
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: A markup language used to structure web content
wrongAnswers: A programming language commonly used for web interactivity
A CSS rule that applies styles under certain device conditions
Small site data stored by a browser

listOfQuestions.question: In Web Development, what does "CSS" mean?
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: A style language used to control presentation and layout
wrongAnswers: A tree representation of a web document
Design that adapts to different screen sizes and contexts
Persistent key-value storage in a browser

listOfQuestions.question: In Web Development, what does "JavaScript" mean?
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: A programming language commonly used for web interactivity
wrongAnswers: An HTML element that communicates meaning about its content
A message sent by a client to ask a server for an action
A specific address where a service accepts requests

listOfQuestions.question: In Web Development, what does "DOM" mean?
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: A tree representation of a web document
wrongAnswers: A CSS layout model for arranging items in one dimension
A message returned by a server after a request
A text format for structured data

wrongAnswers: A CSS layout model for arranging items in rows and columns
